attack.title: PayPay management has demanded a Return To Office
attack.body: Starting July 2026 all full-time PayPay Product Division employees will be required to spend a minimum amount of time in the office

detail.week: One day a week for people living within 100 minutes of the office
detail.month: One day a month for everyone else

attack.alert: This is completely contrary to the PayPay job listings and recruitment articles promising <1>Full Remote Forever</1>

form.title: We are forming a PayPay Workers Union
form.body: You didn't expect mandatory RTO and you won't expect the next demand from management
form.insurance: A Union is like insurance for your working conditions
form.fight: We will <1>Fight the Return To Office</1>. Aiming for full remote and to guarantee no more increases in minimum office time
form.form: We are gathering PayPay employees' opinions on the issue
form.please: Please let us know your thoughts
